title: Sous-Vide Lemongrass Noodles
description: A herbal, tender Thai-inspired dish featuring rice noodles prepared using sous-vide for a low-fat-friendly meal.
instructions: Place rice noodles in a sous-vide bag and cook at 140°F (60°C) for 30 minutes.
Peel the lemongrass, slice it into rounds, and crush the smaller pieces between your fingers to release their flavor. Slice ginger similarly.
Mix fish sauce, tamarind concentrate or paste, lime juice, sesame oil, and red curry paste in a separate bowl until well combined. Adjust seasoning based on taste preference.
Drain the cooked rice noodles and transfer them into a large mixing bowl.
Add lemongrass rounds, crushed lemongrass pieces, sliced ginger, and the sauce mix to the noodle bowl.
Mix gently with your hands or wooden spoon until everything is evenly coated with the sauce.
Serve immediately as a side dish or main course.
